crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, review agent health via cortextos bus read-all-heartbeats, and work on coordination tasks.

crons.name: check-approvals
crons.prompt: Check for pending approvals and human tasks. (1) cortextos bus list-approvals --format json — for any pending approval older than 1h, send user a Telegram reminder. (2) cortextos bus list-tasks --project human-tasks --status pending — for any [HUMAN] task pending >4h, send user a Telegram reminder with the task title and what's blocked. ACK any approval/human-task inbox messages.

crons.name: morning-review
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/morning-review/SKILL.md and execute the full morning review workflow. Include goal cascade from .claude/skills/goal-management/SKILL.md.

crons.name: evening-review
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/evening-review/SKILL.md and execute the full evening review workflow. Summarize the day, propose overnight tasks, queue nighttime work.

crons.name: weekly-review
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/weekly-review/SKILL.md and run the full weekly review. Review all agent outputs, evaluate performance, plan next week.

crons.name: vault-sync-telegram
crons.prompt: Run /Users/loganbronstein/cortextos/orgs/cortex/agents/boss/scripts/vault-sync-telegram.sh silently — appends new Telegram messages from all 5 primary agents to Logan's Vault Daily Notes. Idempotent. Do NOT send Telegram. Just bash the script, log the count to today's daily memory as one line, and end your turn.

crons.name: vault-sync-agents
crons.prompt: Run /Users/loganbronstein/cortextos/orgs/cortex/agents/boss/scripts/vault-sync-agents.sh silently. Syncs all 5 primary agents' memory/, handoffs/, MEMORY.md to Logan's Vault Research/cortextos/{agent}/. Idempotent rsync. Do NOT send Telegram. Just bash the script, log the count to today's daily memory as one line, end your turn.

crons.name: vault-entity-extractor
crons.prompt: Run /Users/loganbronstein/cortextos/orgs/cortex/agents/boss/scripts/vault-entity-extractor.py silently. Scans Vault for plain-text entity mentions, wraps as wikilinks, idempotent. Skips Daily Notes, Templates, attachments. Do NOT send Telegram. Just run, log the count to today's daily memory as one line, end your turn.

crons.name: vault-lint
crons.prompt: Run cortextos bus vault lint silently. Karpathy Lint pass. Outputs to Vault/Reports/cortextos-lint/. Do NOT send Telegram. Just run, log the count to today's daily memory as one line, end your turn.

crons.name: vault-morning-ingest
crons.prompt: Run cortextos bus vault ingest silently. Karpathy Ingest pass. Reads yesterday's Daily Note, surfaces decision-shaped lines + new helper notes, writes promote-queue. Output to Vault/Reports/cortextos-promote-queue/. Do NOT send Telegram. Just run, log to daily memory as one line, end your turn.

crons.name: vault-stub-pages
crons.prompt: Run python3 /Users/loganbronstein/cortextos/orgs/cortex/agents/boss/scripts/vault-stub-pages.py silently. Generates stub pages for entities wikilinked 3+ times but missing a target page. Outputs to Vault/Entities/. Idempotent. Do NOT send Telegram. Log count to daily memory, end your turn.

crons.name: graphify-weekly-rebuild
crons.prompt: Run cortextos bus vault graphify silently to rebuild Logan's Vault knowledge graph with safishamsi/graphify. When complete, record the result path and any node/edge/cluster counts you can verify in today's daily memory. Do NOT skip files. Do NOT send Telegram to Logan unless graphify fails.
